title: Action
description: An Action is a product-level operation — it maps from an Operational Action and is realized as a UI trigger and an API endpoint action.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the action.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this action does.

action.description: The Operational Action this product action maps from. Defaults to matching `name` when omitted.

method.description: The HTTP method for this action when realized as an API endpoint.

input.description: The fields required as input to perform this action.

output.description: The fields returned as a result of this action.
